repositories.reason: Small, reviewable CLI issues can be valuable when current upstream still reproduces and no PR owns the issue.
High-impact runtime and stdlib issues, but contribution policy and current-main reproduction must be gated carefully.
Large language/toolchain queue where tracking/proposal/process labels must be separated from fixable defects.
Important infrastructure queue with ownership, SIG routing, and duplicate/current-work risk.
Large desktop/tooling queue with high duplicate risk; useful for spotting narrow, unowned, reproducible bugs.
